cards.contentText: The unique stripes of zebras make them one of the animals most familiar to people.
cards.contentTextLong: The unique stripes of zebras make them one of the animals most familiar to people. They occur in a variety of habitats, such as grasslands, savannas, woodlands, thorny scrublands, mountains, and coastal hills. Various anthropogenic factors have had a severe impact on zebra populations, in particular hunting for skins and habitat destruction. Grévy's zebra and the mountain zebra are endangered. While plains zebras are much more plentiful, one subspecies, the quagga.

seoNavPage.heroSubtitle: {n}+ curated professional SEO tools across {c} core areas — keyword research, technical audits, content optimization and AI search monitoring
seoNavPage.searchPlaceholder: Search tools by name, feature or tag...
seoNavPage.featuredDesc: Core tools every site owner needs — each battle-tested in the field
seoNavPage.empty: No matching tools — try a different keyword
seoNavPage.tip1Body: Find breakout terms with Exploding Topics, uncover real user questions with AnswerThePublic, and validate volume with Google Keyword Planner.
seoNavPage.tip2Body: Crawl your whole site monthly with Screaming Frog, check Core Web Vitals with PageSpeed Insights, and fix technical SEO issues promptly.
seoNavPage.tip3Body: Score your content with SurferSEO or Clearscope, and use Frase.io to quickly draft high-ranking article outlines.
seoNavPage.tip4Title: Prepare for the AI search era
seoNavPage.tip4Body: Track how often your brand is cited across AI tools with GEO/AEO Tracker, and improve visibility in Google AI Overviews with SearchAttention.
seoNavPage.tip5Body: Analyze competitors' backlink sources with Majestic, then automate outreach with Respona or BacklinkGPT.
seoNavPage.tip6Body: Combine Google Search Console data with competitor traffic from Similarweb to pinpoint your biggest growth opportunities.
seoNavPage.seoTitle: SEO Tools Directory — 100+ Curated SEO Tools
seoNavPage.seoDescription: A curated directory of 100+ SEO tools across keyword research, backlink analysis, technical SEO, content optimization and local SEO to help you rank higher in Google. Free tools highlighted.
seoNavPage.seoKeywords: SEO tools,keyword research tools,backlink analysis,technical SEO,Ahrefs,Semrush,Google Search Console

geoNavPage.heroSubtitle: A curated set of {n}+ tools and resources across 6 categories — China SaaS、China Providers、Global Tools、SEO Add-ons、Free Tools、Open-Source Projects
geoNavPage.searchPlaceholder: Search tools by name, feature or tag...
geoNavPage.empty: No matching tools — try a different keyword
geoNavPage.tip1Body: Use Lens GEO (free) or HubSpot AI Grader (free) to quickly baseline your brand’s visibility in major AI engines and decide whether systematic optimization is needed.
geoNavPage.tip2Body: Use aeo.js or the LLMrefs llms.txt generator (free) to add an llms.txt file that tells AI crawlers your site’s core structure — foundational GEO work.
geoNavPage.tip3Body: Add JSON-LD Schema (Article, FAQ, Organization) to key pages and validate with Google Rich Results Test — structured data is key for AI engines to understand your entities.
geoNavPage.tip4Body: Princeton’s KDD 2024 research shows that adding statistics、FAQ format、authoritative citations and clear heading hierarchy significantly raises AI citation rates. Use Frase.io to assist content analysis.
geoNavPage.tip5Body: For China, try ImpetaAI (50+ metrics) or GEOWISE (content + monitoring); for global, try Otterly.AI ($29/mo) or Profound (enterprise).
geoNavPage.tip6Body: On Wikidata establish your brand entity, and via Chuanshenggang (128 state-media outlets) or other authoritative media, raise your brand’s E-E-A-T trust signals in AI engines.
geoNavPage.seoTitle: GEO Tools Directory — Generative Engine Optimization Tools
geoNavPage.seoDescription: A directory of 60+ GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) tools to help your content get cited by AI search engines like ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews — covering AI visibility monitoring, brand mention analysis and llms.txt.
geoNavPage.seoKeywords: GEO tools,generative engine optimization,AI search optimization,ChatGPT SEO,Perplexity optimization,AI visibility

aeoNavPage.heroSubtitle: A curated set of {n}+ tools and resources across 6 categories — AEO-Focused SaaS、Enterprise SEO Modules、Content Optimization、Question Research、Structured Data、China Platforms
aeoNavPage.searchPlaceholder: Search tools by name, feature or tag...
aeoNavPage.empty: No matching tools — try a different keyword
aeoNavPage.tip1Body: Use Otterly.AI ($29/mo, 15,000+ users) or GetCito/Elmo (open source, free) to quickly baseline your brand’s exposure across ChatGPT, Perplexity and Gemini. For China-focused brands, Lens GEO (free) is a top pick.
aeoNavPage.tip2Body: Use AlsoAsked (a visual PAA question tree) and AnswerThePublic (5W1H question aggregation) to find real user intent and prioritize the high-frequency questions AI cites most.
aeoNavPage.tip3Body: Use Frase.io (AI summaries + FAQ generation, $14.99/mo) or Surfer SEO (content scoring + LLM optimization) to write clear, semantically complete content that ranks on Google and gets cited by AI.
aeoNavPage.tip4Body: On WordPress, use Rank Math to auto-generate FAQ/HowTo Schema; on modern frameworks use aeo.js (⭐76) to one-click generate llms.txt + JSON-LD; then validate with the Google Rich Results Test (free).
aeoNavPage.tip5Body: Teams with an existing SEO stack can enable the AEO modules in Semrush AI Visibility or Ahrefs Brand Radar — extending into AEO without replacing current tools.
aeoNavPage.tip6Body: For the China market, use AIDSO (DSO+GEO+AEO in one) or Yishan Tech (7 proprietary systems) to cover major domestic platforms like Doubao, DeepSeek, Kimi and Tongyi Qianwen and build AI-visibility advantage.
aeoNavPage.seoTitle: AEO Tools Directory — Answer Engine Optimization Tools
aeoNavPage.seoDescription: A directory of 50+ AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) tools to help your content appear in Google featured snippets, AI direct answers and voice search — including Schema generators, snippet optimization and structured-data validators.
aeoNavPage.seoKeywords: AEO tools,answer engine optimization,featured snippets,Schema markup,structured data,voice search optimization

aiCheckerPage.heroSubtitle: An aggregated {n}+ AI-visibility checkers covering 9 major China AI engines and major global AI platforms — from free quick checks to enterprise monitoring, helping brands fully understand their AI-search exposure
aiCheckerPage.searchPlaceholder: Search tools by name, platform or feature...
aiCheckerPage.empty: No matching tools — try a different keyword
aiCheckerPage.tipsTitle: How to improve AI visibility after a check
aiCheckerPage.tip1Body: Use Lens GEO (China) or AppearOnAI (global, free) to get a baseline AI visibility report and confirm whether major AI engines mention your brand.
aiCheckerPage.tip2Body: Use an llms.txt generator to create an llms.txt file that tells AI crawlers your site’s core content — the most basic step toward better AI visibility.
aiCheckerPage.tip3Body: Add JSON-LD Schema (Article, FAQ, Organization) to important pages and validate with the Google Rich Results Test to help AI engines understand your entities.
aiCheckerPage.tip4Body: Add statistics, FAQ format and authoritative citations, and use Frase.io to analyze the content patterns AI cites — greatly raising citation odds.
aiCheckerPage.tip5Body: For China, choose SheepGeo (9 models) or ImpetaAI (50+ metrics); for global, choose Otterly.AI ($29/mo) for ongoing tracking and a re-check habit.
aiCheckerPage.tip6Body: AI engines update their models and training data monthly, so re-check your visibility with free tools monthly to track results and adjust your strategy in time.
aiCheckerPage.seoTitle: AI Visibility Checker — Analyze AI Citations of Your Content
aiCheckerPage.seoDescription: Check how your content is cited and how visible it is across major AI models like ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and Gemini. Understand your brand exposure in AI search and refine your GEO strategy.
aiCheckerPage.seoKeywords: AI visibility checker,brand AI citation analysis,ChatGPT brand exposure,GEO measurement,AI search visibility

llmsTxtPage.heroSub: Like robots.txt, but built for large AI models — it tells ChatGPT, Perplexity and Gemini what your site offers. Proposed by Jeremy Howard (fast.ai) in 2024, it has become a core GEO/AEO infrastructure standard.
llmsTxtPage.tplIntro: llms.txt templates by industry — click to copy, paste into any editor to adjust, then upload to your site root.
llmsTxtPage.tplHow1: Click "Copy template" to copy the content to your clipboard
llmsTxtPage.tplHow2: Paste into any text editor and edit the site name, links and descriptions to match your site
llmsTxtPage.tplHow3: Save the file as llms.txt and upload it to your site root
llmsTxtPage.tplHow5: Open "Recommended tools" → "Submit & indexing platforms" to submit it for indexing
llmsTxtPage.gWhatP1: llms.txt is a plain-text file in your site root, designed specifically for large AI models — it tells the LLM "what this site is about, which pages are worth reading, and how to understand it".
llmsTxtPage.gWhatP2: Proposed by Jeremy Howard (fast.ai founder) in 2024. Just as robots.txt is for search engine crawlers, llms.txt is a semantic index for AI models. Cloudflare, Anthropic, Perplexity and other ecosystem tools already read it.
llmsTxtPage.gFormatCode:
# Site name

> Describe in one sentence what this site is about

## Key pages
- [page name](URL): short note
- [about us](https://example.com/about): company intro

## Products / Services
- [Product A](https://example.com/product): feature notes

## Optional
- [Blog](https://example.com/blog): articles
llmsTxtPage.gFormatNote: Minimal format: Markdown + a link list, so LLMs can read your site structure at a glance.
llmsTxtPage.gBest1: Make the one-line description precise: include business type + target users + core value
llmsTxtPage.gBest2: Make link descriptions specific: avoid "Read more"; clearly describe the page content
llmsTxtPage.gBest3: Use Optional to set priority: core content first, secondary content under Optional
llmsTxtPage.gBest4: Keep it concise: 3–8 links per section is ideal
llmsTxtPage.gBest5: Update regularly: refresh your llms.txt after any major site redesign
llmsTxtPage.gDeploy1: Use the template library to write or copy an llms.txt that fits your site
llmsTxtPage.gDeploy2: Upload the file to your site root (next to robots.txt)
llmsTxtPage.gDeploy4: Submit to AI indexing platforms for more exposure
llmsTxtPage.seoTitle: llms.txt Tools — AI Crawler Site Index Configuration
llmsTxtPage.seoDescription: llms.txt generators, validators and templates in one place. Build an AI-readable semantic index file so ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude and other AI models understand and cite your site content better.
llmsTxtPage.seoKeywords: llms.txt,AI crawler configuration,AI index file,ChatGPT site index,Perplexity,AI visibility

schemaGeneratorPage.heroSubtitle: An aggregated {n}+ Schema generators and tools, covering {c} common types with JSON-LD templates and field notes — quickly add structured data to your site and improve rich results and AI citations.
schemaGeneratorPage.validateTip: After generating code, always validate with Google Rich Results Test and Schema.org Validator
schemaGeneratorPage.aiAutoTip: Great for WordPress owners or anyone who wants "set once, runs forever"
schemaGeneratorPage.tip1: Place JSON-LD in the <head> or <body> — either works
schemaGeneratorPage.tip2: You can stack multiple Schema types on one page
schemaGeneratorPage.tip3: FAQ Schema works best for AI search citations
schemaGeneratorPage.tip4: Google starts recognizing it 1–2 weeks after deployment
schemaGeneratorPage.tip5: Re-validate Schema after every content update
schemaGeneratorPage.seoTitle: Schema Structured Data Tool — JSON-LD Generation & Validation
schemaGeneratorPage.seoDescription: A free Schema structured-data tool supporting JSON-LD and Microdata. Generate and validate 20+ Schema types including Article, FAQ, Product, HowTo and BreadcrumbList to improve your search result appearance.
schemaGeneratorPage.seoKeywords: Schema generator,JSON-LD generation,structured data,FAQ Schema,Article Schema,rich results
